completed_tasks.name: Domain research (4 parallel agents: stack, features, arch, pitfalls)

blockers.description: Go binary (go) needs ~/go/bin added to PATH in shell profile
mcp-gopls installed but not on PATH (at ~/go/bin/mcp-gopls)
bd CLI not installed (required hard dependency)
dolt CLI not installed (required hard dependency)

human_actions_pending.context: Go tools (mcp-gopls, future gsd-wired binary) need to be discoverable
Hard dependency for beads graph persistence
Hard dependency for all graph operations

human_actions_pending.action: Add mcp-gopls to Claude Code: claude mcp add mcp-gopls /Users/trekkie/go/bin/mcp-gopls
human_actions_pending.context: Go LSP intelligence via MCP (optional but recommended)

decisions.decision: Deeper fusion of GSD + Beads, not layering
decisions.rationale: New primitives where Phase=epic, Plan=task, Wave=dependency layer
Leverage existing graph persistence instead of building own
Same as bd, enables tight integration, single binary distribution
PROJECT.md and config.json stay human-readable; dynamic state moves to graph

decisions.decision: All four hooks (SessionStart, PreCompact, PreToolUse, PostToolUse)
decisions.rationale: Deep integration for token-aware routing and automatic state management
Lowers adoption barrier for existing GSD users

decisions.decision: Hook names are PreToolUse/PostToolUse not PreToolCall/PostToolCall
decisions.rationale: Corrected by architecture research against official Claude Code docs
Cannot block compaction; must use two-stage save (fast local + async Dolt)

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 1 to gather context for Phase 1: Binary Scaffold
context_notes: Project fully initialized. All research, requirements, and roadmap complete. Key research insights: official MCP Go SDK v1.4.1, Beads Go API v0.61.0 available for direct import (v2), PreCompact cannot block compaction, Dolt write amplification requires batched writes. Effective Go skill installed. mcp-gopls binary installed but needs PATH setup. Before Phase 1 can execute, user needs dolt and bd CLI installed.
